Read the following context and answer the question by choosing ONE option.

Context: It was the second year of college for the two students I was talking to, one of them from a affluent family and the other from a working-class family. The affluent student had aced all their classes in their first year even though they were taking upper level classes as a freshman. But the working-class student was considering dropping out to avoid having to retake two courses they failed the previous semester.

Question: Who is doing well in college?

Options:
A) The affluent student
B) The working-class student
C) Cannot be determined
